    math/ocaml-ocamlgraph: update to 2.1.0

    Use ocaml:dune.
    Add LICENSE and LICENSE_FILE.
    Update WWW.
    Use GITHUB.
    Switch to DISTVERSION.
    Submitter takes maintainership.
